title: Wrong Calendar Entry
description: Calendar says 'John Smith' but actual candidate is 'Jane Smith' — metadata is unreliable

events.text: Hi! I was expecting John Smith — are you here for the Data Engineer interview?
Hi Maria! Yes, I'm Jane Smith. I think there might have been a mix-up with the first name in the calendar invite. I applied for the Data Engineer position.
No problem at all! Let me pull up your resume. So Jane, tell me about your experience with data pipelines.
I've been working with Apache Spark and Airflow for the past 3 years. At my current company, I designed and maintained ETL pipelines processing terabytes of data daily.
How do you handle data quality issues in your pipelines?
I implement data validation at multiple stages — ingestion, transformation, and output. I use Great Expectations for automated data quality checks and set up alerts for anomalies.
